tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — tokens oklch + tailwind
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remplacer les variables CSS HSL par les tokens oklch du design system, étendre tailwind.config.js, vérifier que les composants shadcn existants s'adaptent.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/index.css`
- Modify: `tailwind.config.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `yarn build` passe sans erreur
- [ ] Classes `bg-bg-1`, `text-ink-0`, `bg-ok-soft`, `text-err` disponibles
- [ ] ThemeProvider applique `.dark` et les dark tokens sont actifs

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/index.css", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/tailwind.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["yarn build passe", "tokens oklch disponibles en Tailwind", "dark mode fonctionne"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shell — Sidebar + Topbar + AppShell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refondre le layout global — AppShell grid sidebar+main, Sidebar 232px avec barre active, Topbar 52px.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/layout/AppShell.jsx`
- Modify: `src/components/layout/Sidebar.jsx`
- Modify: `src/components/layout/Topbar.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Sidebar 232px fixe, nav items barre active 2px accent
- [ ] Topbar 52px, breadcrumbs gauche, dark toggle droite
- [ ] AppShell grid sidebar+main, scroll dans main uniquement
- [ ] yarn test PASS

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/layout/AppShell.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/layout/Topbar.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sidebar 232px", "Topbar 52px", "tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Primitives Overview — Pill, StatTile, Sparkline, Timeline, CapacityRing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Créer les 5 primitives UI nécessaires à Overview.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/ui/Pill.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/ui/StatTile.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/ui/Sparkline.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/ui/Timeline.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/ui/CapacityRing.jsx`
- Create: `tests/ui-primitives.test.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Pill rend avec chaque tone
- [ ] StatTile skeleton quand value=null
- [ ] Sparkline ligne plate quand data=[]
- [ ] Timeline rend sans erreur
- [ ] CapacityRing calcule strokeDashoffset
- [ ] yarn test PASS

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn test tests/ui-primitives.test.jsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/ui/Pill.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/ui/StatTile.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/ui/Sparkline.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/ui/Timeline.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/ui/CapacityRing.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/tests/ui-primitives.test.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn test tests/ui-primitives.test.jsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tous les tests ui-primitives passent"]}
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
